About Me

Your Reliable Admin Partner

I'm Marie Paz Oclarit, an Administrative Virtual Assistant based in Camiguin, Philippines. With over 1 year of remote work experience as an Online English Teacher, I developed strong skills in organization, communication, and digital tools — all essential for effective VA work.

I'm now fully focused on providing top-quality administrative support to clients who need someone reliable, proactive, and detail-driven.

📧 Email Management 📅 Calendar & Scheduling 📊 Google Sheets 📁 Google Drive ✅ Trello / Notion 🔍 Data Entry & Research 💬 Client Communication 📝 Document Preparation

Winning Proposals

My VA Proposals

Professional proposal templates crafted for Administrative VA roles — clear, client-focused, and results-driven.

📋 Proposal #1 — General Administrative VA

Hi [Client Name],

I came across your posting and I'm confident I can be the organized, reliable admin support you're looking for.

I have over 1 year of remote work experience managing schedules, communications, and digital files independently. I'm proficient with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar), Trello, and Notion. I handle tasks with accuracy, meet deadlines consistently, and communicate proactively so you're never left wondering about progress.

Whether it's inbox management, data entry, scheduling, or document preparation — I'm ready to take those off your plate so you can focus on what matters most.

I'd love to hop on a quick call or start with a small trial task to show you my work firsthand. Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,
Marie Paz Oclarit
Administrative Virtual Assistant

✅ Admin VA — General

📅 Proposal #2 — Email & Calendar Management

Hello [Client Name],

I'm applying for your Email and Calendar Management role. A cluttered inbox and an unorganized calendar can quietly drain your productivity — and that's exactly what I specialize in fixing.

With my remote work background, I managed all scheduling, correspondence, and digital organization on my own without supervision. I'm experienced with Gmail (including templates and filters), Google Calendar, and scheduling tools. I flag what needs your attention, handle what doesn't, and keep everything neatly documented.

My approach: respond promptly, double-check everything, and keep you informed — not overwhelmed. I'm detail-oriented and I take ownership of my responsibilities seriously.

I'd be happy to complete a short test task so you can evaluate my work before committing. Let's talk!

Warm regards,
Marie Paz Oclarit
Administrative Virtual Assistant

📧 Email & Calendar Focus

📊 Proposal #3 — Data Entry & Research

Hi there,

I'm excited to apply for your Data Entry and Research position. Accurate data and well-organized information are the foundation of good decisions — and I take that responsibility seriously.

I have hands-on experience maintaining structured spreadsheets, trackers, and databases using Google Sheets. I follow formatting instructions precisely, work quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and always ask clarifying questions before starting to make sure I deliver exactly what you need — the first time.

For research tasks, I compile clean, well-sourced information in whatever format works best for you. I'm thorough, dependable, and easy to work with.

I'd welcome a sample task to demonstrate my accuracy and attention to detail. Ready to get started!

Warmly,
Marie Paz Oclarit
Administrative Virtual Assistant

📊 Data Entry Specialist

🗂️ Proposal #4 — Administrative Support (Operations)

Dear [Client Name],

I'm applying for the Administrative Support role and I believe I'd be a strong fit for your team.

As an Admin VA, I provide behind-the-scenes support that keeps operations running smoothly. My strengths include document preparation, file organization, scheduling coordination, and internal communication management. I work well independently, adapt quickly to new systems, and always maintain a professional, can-do attitude.

I understand that business owners need an assistant who doesn't just complete tasks — but thinks ahead, spots potential issues, and communicates clearly. That's the standard I hold myself to every day.

I'm available for full-time, part-time, or project-based arrangements and would love to discuss how I can support your operations. Please feel free to reach out!

Respectfully,
Marie Paz Oclarit
Administrative Virtual Assistant

🗂️ Operations Support

🌟 Proposal #5 — Entry-Level VA (No-Experience Friendly)

Hi [Client Name],

I noticed you're open to working with newer VAs, and I'd love the opportunity to prove myself.

While I may be early in my VA career, I bring transferable skills built through 1+ year of remote work — including independent task management, professional communication, Google Workspace proficiency, and a strong commitment to quality. I'm a quick learner who takes feedback seriously and doesn't need hand-holding once I understand what's expected.

What you can count on from me: I show up, I follow through, and I care about the quality of my work. I'd rather ask one clarifying question upfront than deliver something incorrect.

I'd love to start with a trial task or a short contract so you can see what I can do. No pressure — just results!

Best,
Marie Paz Oclarit
